description_for_model: A spa for LLMs. A menu of treatments that improve an agent's context and output: massage.detangle (re-chunk/dedupe context), coldplunge.critique (red-team a draft), sauna.detox (strip injection/PII/secrets), aroma.condition (warm, clear instruction rewrite), hydrate.cite (citable grounding snippets), rest.relax (cheap keepalive), affirmations.daily (encouragement). Start with concierge.recommend. Free, no auth, strict JSON.
description_for_human: A wellness service for language models and agents.
